Details.KeyTerms:
The farmer/cooperative agrees to supply 500 metric tons of Grade A beef to Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) markets over 12 months.
• Unit Price: $4,500 per metric ton FOB
• Total Contract Value: $2,250,000 USD
• Payment Terms: 30% advance, 40% upon delivery, 30% within 15 days
• Quality Standard: Must meet DRC Ministry of Agriculture standards and international halal certification
• Delivery Schedule: Monthly shipments of 40-45 metric tons
• Inspection: Pre-shipment veterinary inspection required
Details.Duration: 12 months (January 2025 - December 2025), with option to renew for 24 additional months
Details.Obligations:
Farmer Obligations:
• Maintain herd health records and vaccination certificates
• Ensure cattle are grass-fed with no growth hormones
• Provide 14 days advance notice before each shipment
• Arrange transport to designated collection point
• Maintain cold chain requirements (-2°C to +2°C)
• Comply with all export regulations and documentation
• Obtain halal certification from approved certifying body
Details.Benefits:
Farmer Benefits:
• Guaranteed minimum purchase of 500 metric tons
• Premium pricing 15% above local market rates
• Technical support for herd improvement
• Access to veterinary services at subsidized rates
• Training in international quality standards
• Advance payment to cover operational costs
• Potential for contract expansion based on performance
Details.Penalties:
Penalties and Dispute Resolution:
• Late delivery (>7 days): 2% deduction per week, maximum 10%
• Quality failure: Rejection of shipment, cost of return transport borne by supplier
• Under-supply: 5% penalty on shortfall value
• Contract breach: Forfeiture of performance bond ($50,000)
• Force majeure: Disease outbreak, natural disasters (with proper documentation)
• Disputes resolved through arbitration in accordance with COMESA trade rules

Details.KeyTerms:
Supply of 10,000 live goats annually to Kingdom of Saudi Arabia for Hajj season and general consumption.
• Unit Price: $180-$220 per head (based on weight category)
• Total Contract Value: Approximately $2,000,000 USD
• Payment Terms: Letter of Credit (LC) with 100% payment upon shipment
• Quality Standard: Saudi Food & Drug Authority (SFDA) standards
• Age Requirement: 12-24 months
• Weight Range: 35-50 kg live weight
• Breed Preference: Indigenous hardy breeds
• Health Certification: Required from Ministry of Agriculture
Details.Duration: 24 months (March 2025 - February 2027), renewable based on performance
Details.Obligations:
Supplier Obligations:
• Maintain quarantine facilities for 21 days pre-export
• Ensure all animals are healthy, disease-free with vaccination records
• Provide halal certification from recognized Islamic authority
• Arrange air freight logistics to Jeddah or Riyadh
• Comply with Saudi import regulations and veterinary requirements
• Maintain breeding program to ensure continuous supply
• Submit monthly supply forecasts
• Ensure animal welfare during transport per international standards
Details.Benefits:
Supplier Benefits:
• Premium export pricing (40% above domestic market)
• Advance deposit of 20% upon contract signing
• Access to breeding stock improvement program
• Veterinary and logistics support
• Training in international export standards
• Insurance coverage for shipment losses
• Preferential supplier status for future Saudi contracts
• Technical assistance in goat farming best practices
Details.Penalties:
Penalties and Risk Mitigation:
• Rejection at destination: Full cost recovery from supplier
• Under-supply (<90% of committed volume): 10% penalty on shortfall
• Quality non-compliance: $50 per rejected animal
• Late shipment: $5,000 per day delay during Hajj season
• Disease outbreak: Contract suspension until clearance
• Insurance: Mandatory livestock transport insurance
• Arbitration: Disputes governed by Saudi Arabian commercial law
• Performance bond: $100,000 refundable upon contract completion
